compiled_state.title: Update project docs to reflect hypothesis enforcement changes
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

**What**: Update CLAUDE.md and relevant docs to reflect the new hypothesis enforcement gates, RESULT schema changes, and UserPromptSubmit hook.
**Why**: Future agents need accurate awareness of the new gates so they understand why their investigation results may be rejected.
**Scope**:
- IN: CLAUDE.md architecture section, fix-bug quick reference
- OUT: Creating new documentation files

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md reflects the hypothesis_tests RESULT schema requirement and the RED-before-fix gate
  ← Satisfies: Epic context — ensuring future agents understand the enforcement
- Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for documentation formatting, structure, and conventions.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT: Starting task. Will read CLAUDE.md for fix-bug sections, check .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md, write tests, then update CLAUDE.md minimally to reflect hypothesis_tests RESULT schema and RED-before-fix gate.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT: Complete. Created RED test (tests/scripts/test-claude-md-fix-bug-gates.sh), confirmed it failed, updated CLAUDE.md Bug fixes line to mention hypothesis_tests RESULT schema requirement and RED-before-fix gate, confirmed GREEN (2/2 tests pass). Updated .test-index to associate new test with CLAUDE.md.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: CLAUDE.md updated with hypothesis_tests RESULT schema, Hypothesis Validation Gate, and RED-before-fix Gate references. 2 tests added.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
